info.title: Fulfillment - bg.logistics.shipment.create
info.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.

post.summary: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.
post.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.create interface is for sellers to place online logistics orders and receive package numbers, which enables to effortlessly place logistics orders with selected carriers online.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.logistics.shipment.create`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: sendType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: SendType 0:All the products in one parent order are shipped in one package with one tracking number 1:Partical products in one parent order are shipped in multiple packages with multiple tracking numbers and all the products in one order should be shipped in one API call. 2:All the products in multiple parent orders are shipped in one package with one tracking number.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: shipLater
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Ship Later TRUE: apply to create the package apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. Mark this package as "ship later". Order with "Y2_advance_sale" label must set "shipLater=true" when you buy shipping label. FALSE: apply to create the package. apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. apply to ship the package with these tracking numbers and mark this package as shipped.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: shipLaterLimitTime
x-temu-request-parameters.description: For orders without "Y2_advance_sale" label, the deadline for later shipment, with options being: 24,48,72,96,120 hours. For orders with"Y2_advance_sale" label, the deadline for later shipment, with options being: 192, 216,240,264,288,312,336,360hours.

rows.Error Message: The input warehouse does not support the USPS Ground Advantage shipping service. It is recommended to use a warehouse where "supportsUspsGroundAdvantage" is true by calling the bg.logistics.warehouse.list.get API.
This channel requires passing the exam to gain access.
The current parent order has a pending risk control alert, It is not recommended to proceed with the performance. You can submit a cancellation request.
Invalid pickup reservation time. See pickupRules for valid options.
Incomplete warehouse details. Update in Seller Central to process shipment.
The parent order {*} can not be fulfilled by the selected logistics provider due to the customer's delivery preferences. Please change another logistics provider to fulfill again.

Orders with "signature_required_on_delivery" can only buy shipping label from the channel which provide signature service. Please call "bg.logistics.shippingservices.get" to get the recommended channel and request with the field "signServiceId".
The Order with label "signature_required_on_delivery" and other orders cannot be fulfilled at the same time. Please fulfill the order with label "signature_required_on_delivery" separately.
This logistics provider does not support this business scenario.
Your funds have been reserved, so you are temporarily unable to use the 'Buy shipping' function.
COD package transaction is ongoing, please try again later.
COD orders and PPD orders can't buy shipping label in one open api request.
COD orders cannot be combined with PPD orders for shipping in one package.
COD orders do not allow shipping later, please set shipLater=FALSE.
COD orders do not allow adding sub-packages
Order can only buy shipping label after the "earliestTimeBuyShippingLabel".
Invalid pickup time range. Please ensure times are within the next 5 calendar days (8:00-17:00), on the same day, and can't be weekend, and pickupStartTime is before pickupEndTime
You should choose one fulfillment way and fulfill channelId or shipLogisticsType.
Cooperative warehouse order fulfillment restricted.
Purchasing shipping labels for Amazon FBA warehouses is not supported.
The order with "Y2_advance_sale" label and the order without "Y2_advance_sale" label can't be fulfilled simultaneously.
shipLaterLimitTime is invalid, please check the valid value for orders with "Y2_advance_sale" label
Order with "Y2_advance_sale" label should set "shipLater=true" when you are fulfilled by Temu integrated logistics.
Only order with "Y2_advance_sale" label can be fulfilled by warehouse in "other" type.
Failed to buy the shipping label. Please fill in the warehouse management type and warehouse brand in the Temu seller center first.
The order with "US-to-CA" Label and the order without "US-to-CA" Label can't be shipped together.
Missing required parameters for 'sendSubRequestList'.
Exceeded maximum allowed attached packages. Limit is 10.
For splitSubPackage quantity needs to be 1.
Warehouse and recipient in different countries splitSubPackage cannot enter "TRUE".
Call failed: Cannot convert subPackage to self-shipment.
Address change pending. Please process before shipping.
Order cancel pending. Please process before shipping.
Unexpected parameter pickupTime.
Miss required parameter pickupTime.
A large items template has been used for the items in this package. Only specified logistics providers can be used for shipping.
Product sku sensitive query fail
Order lacks necessary sensitive attributes.
Order lacks necessary sensitive attributes.
Not support local mall
Usage channel does not match the confirmation scenario
The current parent order has a pending risk control alert.
The BBC order is not allowed.
Invalid request parameters
A large items template has been used for the items in this package. Only special channels can be used for shipping.
Orders exist after-sales applications, please complete the processing before operation
The parentOrder or Order is invalid. Please check if the parentOrder matches the Order, the parentOrder or Order is nonexistent etc.
The parameter Weight should be integer.
The parameter warehouseId is invalid.

The request area is incorrect. Please check the request area and replace it with the correct request area. The request area for the United States is US, and the request area for other non-European countries is global.
The parentOrder or Order is invalid. Please check if the parentOrder matches the Order, the parentOrder or Order is nonexistent etc.
O-orders of COD type exist in body, and COD type O-orders can only be shipped with Temu Label.
You have already requested by Temu integrated logistics. Please check whether request is successful by "bg.logistics.shipment.result.get".
rows.Error SOP: Please request "bg.logistics.shipment.result.get" to ensure whether the fulfillment request is successful.

x-temu-examples.content:
curl -X POST \
'https://openapi-b-us.temu.com/openapi/router' \
 -H 'content-type: application/json' \
 -d '{
  "access_token" : "test",
  "sendRequestList" : [ {
    "extendWeightUnit" : "test",
    "pickupStartTime" : 1,
    "splitSubPackage" : true,
    "extendWeight" : "test",
    "pickupEndTime" : 1,
    "length" : "test",
    "dimensionUnit" : "test",
    "weight" : "test",
    "shipCompanyId" : 1,
    "confirmAcceptance" : [ "test", "test" ],
    "warehouseId" : "test",
    "uspsMailingDateOffset" : 1,
    "orderSendInfoList" : [ {
      "quantity" : 1,
      "orderSn" : "test",
      "parentOrderSn" : "test",
      "goodsId" : 1,
      "skuId" : 1
    } ],
    "width" : "test",
    "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
    "signServiceId" : 1,
    "sendSubRequestList" : [ {
      "extendWeightUnit" : "test",
      "pickupStartTime" : 1,
      "extendWeight" : "test",
      "pickupEndTime" : 1,
      "length" : "test",
      "dimensionUnit" : "test",
      "weight" : "test",
      "shipCompanyId" : 1,
      "confirmAcceptance" : [ "test", "test" ],
      "warehouseId" : "test",
      "uspsMailingDateOffset" : 1,
      "width" : "test",
      "shipLogisticsType" : "test",
      "signServiceId" : 1,
      "channelId" : 1,
      "weightUnit" : "test",
      "height" : "test"
    } ],
    "autoConfirmAfterPickup" : true,
    "channelId" : 1,
    "weightUnit" : "test",
    "height" : "test"
  } ],
  "shipLater" : true,
  "app_key" : "test",
  "sign" : "test",
  "data_type" : "test",
  "sendType" : 1,
  "shipLaterLimitTime" : "test",
  "type" : "test",
  "version" : "test",
  "timestamp" : "test"
}'

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `bg.logistics.shipment.create` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

sendType.description: SendType 0:All the products in one parent order are shipped in one package with one tracking number 1:Partical products in one parent order are shipped in multiple packages with multiple tracking numbers and all the products in one order should be shipped in one API call. 2:All the products in multiple parent orders are shipped in one package with one tracking number.

shipLater.description: Ship Later TRUE: apply to create the package apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. Mark this package as "ship later". Order with "Y2_advance_sale" label must set "shipLater=true" when you buy shipping label. FALSE: apply to create the package. apply to create the tracking numbers from Temu-integrated carriers online. apply to ship the package with these tracking numbers and mark this package as shipped.

shipLaterLimitTime.description: For orders without "Y2_advance_sale" label, the deadline for later shipment, with options being: 24,48,72,96,120 hours. For orders with"Y2_advance_sale" label, the deadline for later shipment, with options being: 192, 216,240,264,288,312,336,360hours.
